rows.label: tev046401_MSG0001
rows.name:
I have many to thank for
her. Not just Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046401_MSG0002
rows.name:
My daughter was stubborn. Her
birth was hard. We were both
saved by Ma-non technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046401_MSG0003
rows.name:
And you helped with funeral
ritual when Bazis could not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046401_MSG0004
rows.name:
This city is such good place.
Maybe even better than old home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I think I will stay and raise Helna
here. I think I can with your help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Helna eats much. Sleeps
much. But cries even more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046401_MSG0011
rows.name:
She is such beautiful, healthy
child. It is hard work, but
watching her grow is rewarding![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Bazis helps watch our daughter
when he returns from hunt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev046401_MSG0013
rows.name:
I could not be happier mother! To be surrounded
by such family and friends? Great Tree's Old
Ones have honored me with this destiny.[ST:wait ]
